productDisplayName: Nike Women's City Cou White Shoe
description: If you're looking for a tennis shoe with excellent cushioning and good grip, then look no further than the City Court VI from nike. With its textured outsole and soft footbed, the sprints on the court are set to become even more springy.Upper Perforated full-grain leather and synthetic upper with mesh for lightweight support and breathability Padded collar with mesh tongue for breathability and comfort Breathable mesh lining with cushioned footbed for added comfort Abrasion-resistant material in the toe enhances durability in this high-wear area Midsole Soft and cushioned footbed for light weight step-in comfort Full-length Phylon midsole for a smooth ride and impact protection Outsole Midfoot TPU shank for lateral stability during multi-directional movements Lateral-side outrigger piece help provide on-court stability and support Full-length GDR (Green Durable Rubber) compound in a traditional, multi-surface, herringbone tread pattern for long-lasting durability and traction Shoe careWipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine washDo not store in direct sunlight
